Interface ISpatialCacheManager2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control the Spatial Cache Management.

[Guid("9078F181-BB75-11D4-9FEB-00C04F6BDF0C")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISpatialCacheManager2 : ISpatialCacheManager

Properties

CacheExpansionFactor

The extent expansion factor for the spatial cache.

double CacheExpansionFactor { get; }

double
